description_long: This object consists of two resealable stand-up pouches of organic cacao powder, both with a predominantly yellow front and brown back. The front of each pouch features a large circular label with the words 'Organic Cacao Powder' surrounded by cacao bean illustrations, and additional icons and certifications along the bottom. The back of each pouch is brown with detailed product information, including a mission statement, usage instructions, a map graphic, and a nutrition facts panel. The pouches are made of flexible plastic with a matte finish and have a gusseted base for stability. The packaging is designed to be airtight and resealable, likely with a zip-lock mechanism at the top. These pouches are lightweight and portable, suitable for display or sale in urban grocery stores or markets.
description: Two yellow and brown resealable stand-up pouches of organic cacao powder with prominent circular labels and detailed product information on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing both pouches with large circular 'Organic Cacao Powder' labels and certification icons.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin profile of the pouches and the gusseted base, with a glimpse of the label edges.
description_view_2: Back view revealing detailed product information, including a nutrition facts panel, mission statement, and map graphic.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slim profile and the seam of the pouches, with partial visibility of the back labels.
attribute_brand_logo: A circular logo with the text 'Organic Cacao Powder' surrounded by cacao beans, located centrally on the front of each pouch, with dominant colors brown and white.
attribute_flavor_indication: The word 'Cacao' and images of cacao beans on the front label indicate a chocolate/cacao flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel is visible on the back of each pouch, along with ingredient and usage information.
attribute_promotional_graphics: Certification icons and a map graphic are present on the back, but no special promotional graphics or mascots are visible.
